name: Lemon Saffron Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Dissolve saffron in hot water; blend with lemon peel and juice.
3. Cream shortening; add sugar gradually, beating until thoroughly blended.
4. Add egg and beat until light and fluffy.
5. Add dry ingredients and liquids alternately, mixing just until blended after each addition.
6. Pour into a well-greased and floured baking pan or 2 lb. coffee can.
7. Cover with lid or coffee can with 6 layers of paper towel.
8. Set in crockpot.
9. Cover and cook on high for 2-3 hours.
10. Remove; let cool 10 minutes, then remove from pan.
